workflow_description: AI-powered sales pipeline that identifies high-potential freemium accounts, enriches them with firmographic and usage data, scores expansion propensity, generates personalized outreach (micro-SaaS sales decks + pricing proposals), and routes qualified leads to sales reps with capacity awareness. The AI never overwhelms the team it's supposed to help.

risk_scores.step_name: Pull product usage data from Snowflake
Generate pricing proposal from live Salesforce data
Check sales team capacity before routing
Route qualified lead to sales rep
Write enrichment + scoring data back to Salesforce
Send Slack notification to assigned rep

failure_mappings.step_name: Check sales team capacity before routing
failure_mappings.rationale: Failure cascades to 4 downstream steps; documented graceful degradation limits blast radius
failure_mappings.mitigation: Verify fallback path is tested and monitored; track fallback activation rate

failure_mappings.step_name: Enrich with firmographic data
failure_mappings.rationale: Failure cascades to 8 downstream steps; documented graceful degradation limits blast radius
failure_mappings.mitigation: Verify fallback path is tested and monitored; track fallback activation rate

failure_mappings.step_name: Enrich with firmographic data
failure_mappings.rationale: Multi-step workflow may degrade context quality
failure_mappings.mitigation: Monitor output quality metrics across session length

failure_mappings.step_name: Enrich with firmographic data
failure_mappings.rationale: Action may complete successfully but with incorrect parameters
failure_mappings.mitigation: Log all action parameters with expected vs. actual diff; add post-action state validation

failure_mappings.step_name: Enrich with firmographic data
failure_mappings.rationale: Step depth or workflow length increases specification drift risk
failure_mappings.mitigation: Re-state task objective in system prompt at this step; add output diff against spec baseline

failure_mappings.step_name: Enrich with firmographic data
failure_mappings.rationale: Action step builds on classified/looked-up data — may propagate upstream errors without challenge
failure_mappings.mitigation: Assert expected data shape before executing action; log action parameters for post-hoc review

failure_mappings.step_name: Enrich with firmographic data
failure_mappings.rationale: Step has 3 tools available — high risk of selecting wrong tool
failure_mappings.mitigation: Add tool-call logging; implement expected-tool assertions; consider restricting available tools per intent

failure_mappings.step_name: Pull product usage data from Snowflake
failure_mappings.rationale: Failure cascades to 8 downstream steps
failure_mappings.mitigation: Add per-step validation gate; implement circuit breaker pattern

failure_mappings.step_name: Pull product usage data from Snowflake
failure_mappings.rationale: High-sensitivity data source may return valid-looking empty or stale data with no error signal
failure_mappings.mitigation: Add non-empty validation gate; alert on unexpectedly low record counts vs. baseline

failure_mappings.step_name: Generate personalized micro-SaaS sales deck
failure_mappings.rationale: Failure cascades to 4 downstream steps
failure_mappings.mitigation: Add per-step validation gate; implement circuit breaker pattern

failure_mappings.step_name: Generate personalized micro-SaaS sales deck
failure_mappings.rationale: Long workflow with generation step risks context window saturation
failure_mappings.mitigation: Implement context summarization between steps; re-inject critical context at each generation step

failure_mappings.step_name: Generate personalized micro-SaaS sales deck
failure_mappings.rationale: Customer-facing generated content may be plausible but functionally incorrect
failure_mappings.mitigation: Implement functional correctness evals (not just semantic); add sampling audit for human review

failure_mappings.step_name: Generate personalized micro-SaaS sales deck
failure_mappings.rationale: Late-stage step in long workflow prone to forgetting original specification
failure_mappings.mitigation: Periodic spec re-injection; compare outputs against original requirements at this checkpoint

failure_mappings.rationale: Generation step builds on classified/looked-up data — may confirm incorrect upstream data

checkpoints.step_name: Generate pricing proposal from live Salesforce data
checkpoints.rationale: High blast radius with irreversible action requires human pre-approval
checkpoints.implementation_detail: Human must approve before step executes; add approval queue with SLA target

checkpoints.step_name: Write enrichment + scoring data back to Salesforce
checkpoints.rationale: Cross-workflow dependency with irreversible write to sensitive data — downstream pipelines consume this record as a source of truth
checkpoints.implementation_detail: Verify record correctness before downstream pipelines consume it; add data-quality assertion gate and alerting on schema drift

checkpoints.rationale: Customer-facing output with low verifiability needs regular human sampling
checkpoints.implementation_detail: Review 5-10% sample of outputs daily; flag anomalies for full review
